# MillionVerifier — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | — | Not a prospecting tool |
| [[email-verification]] | ✓ | 99%+ accuracy claimed; Bulk API + Single API; dedicated catch-all verifier (70–80% reduction in unknowns); anti-greylisting technology; credits only charged for Good (verified) and Bad (invalid) — not unknowns or catch-alls; money-back guarantee if hard bounce > 4%; EverClean automated daily re-verification |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | — | Not applicable |

## Vendor Type
Point solution: the specialist email verification tool. Best-in-class catch-all resolution and credit model.

## Best For
Teams with large existing email lists that need the highest possible verification accuracy before sending. The EverClean feature automatically re-verifies lists daily — critical for long-term list hygiene.

## Limitations
- Verification only — no finding, prospecting, warm-up, or sending
- No Chrome extension
- Must pair with a data source and sequencer for full outreach stack
